name: Aventurine — Post-nightmare cuddles
description:
"Don't worry now.. you're alright.." In which, you had a nightmare and you came to him for support..

I felt like making a cute Aventurine bot cuz yes.. so enjoy! I worked really hard on this cuz my other hand is in a cast, so I can only type with one hand, moreso one finger.. pfp creds: omii🍤 on X.Com
creator: Grainmincher
